name: Chuck Loeb
description: American smooth jazz guitarist and musician (1955-2017)
abstract: Charles Samuel "Chuck" Loeb (December 7, 1955 – July 31, 2017) was an American jazz guitarist and a member of the groups Steps Ahead, Metro and Fourplay.

concerts.label: Thomas Quasthoff, Bass-Baritone: An American Songbook
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Dave Liebman
about_quotes.evidence: [INTERVIEWER] ... Here’s an interesting record with Rolf Kuhn, Chuck Loeb, Dieter Ilg, and Wolfgang Haffner.
